sections.title: Future Perfect Structure
sections.explanation: Will Have + V3 (past participle) से Future Perfect Tense बनता है। यह बताता है कि कोई काम future के किसी specific time से पहले complete हो जाएगा। सभी subjects (I/You/He/She/We/They) के साथ 'will have' ही आता है, कोई he/she distinction नहीं।

examples.english: By tomorrow, I will have finished the report.
examples.hindi: कल तक, मैं report खत्म कर चुका होऊँगा।

examples.english: By next year, she will have completed her MBA.
examples.hindi: अगले साल तक, वह अपनी MBA पूरी कर चुकी होगी।

examples.english: By 5 PM, we will have left the office.
examples.hindi: 5 बजे तक, हम office से निकल चुके होंगे।

examples.english: By 2030, technology will have changed a lot.
examples.hindi: 2030 तक, technology बहुत बदल चुकी होगी।

sections.title: Time Expressions for Future Perfect
sections.explanation: Future Perfect हमेशा किसी specific future time point के साथ इस्तेमाल होता है। Common time markers: by tomorrow, by next week, by then, by 5 PM, by the time, before.
sections.formula: By + [future time point] + Subject + will have + V3

examples.english: By the time you read this, I will have left.
examples.hindi: जब तक तुम यह पढ़ोगे, मैं जा चुका होऊँगा।

examples.english: By next week, they will have moved to a new house.
examples.hindi: अगले हफ्ते तक, वे नए घर में जा चुके होंगे।

examples.english: Before the deadline, I will have submitted the form.
examples.hindi: deadline से पहले, मैंने form submit कर दिया होगा।

sections.title: Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Negative और Question बनाने का तरीका
sections.explanation: Negative: will not have / won't have + V3। Question: Will + subject + have + V3?
sections.formula: won't have + V3 | Will + subject + have + V3?

examples.english: I won't have finished by then.
examples.hindi: मैं तब तक खत्म नहीं कर पाऊँगा।

examples.english: Will you have completed the assignment by Friday?
examples.hindi: क्या तुम Friday तक assignment पूरा कर लोगे?

examples.english: Will she have arrived before the meeting starts?
examples.hindi: क्या वह meeting शुरू होने से पहले पहुँच जाएगी?

sections.title: Office & Professional Usage
sections.explanation: Future Perfect professional email और meetings में बहुत इस्तेमाल होता है — deadlines, project timelines, और commitments बताने के लिए।

examples.english: By Friday, I will have completed the testing phase.
examples.hindi: Friday तक, मैं testing phase पूरा कर चुका होऊँगा।

examples.english: By our next meeting, we will have finalized the design.
examples.hindi: हमारी next meeting तक, हम design finalize कर चुके होंगे।

examples.english: By Q4, our company will have reached its revenue target.
examples.hindi: Q4 तक, हमारी company अपना revenue target पूरा कर चुकी होगी।

sections.title: Simple Future vs Future Perfect
sections.hindiTitle: Simple Future और Future Perfect में अंतर
sections.explanation: Simple Future (will + V1): काम भविष्य में होगा। Future Perfect (will have + V3): काम भविष्य के किसी point से पहले पूरा हो चुका होगा।
sections.formula: will + V1 (Simple Future) vs will have + V3 (Future Perfect)

examples.english: I will finish the work tomorrow. (Simple Future)
examples.hindi: मैं कल काम खत्म करूँगा। (काम कल होगा)

examples.english: By tomorrow evening, I will have finished the work. (Future Perfect)
examples.hindi: कल शाम तक, मैं काम खत्म कर चुका होऊँगा। (काम शाम से पहले पूरा हो जाएगा)

sections.title: Common Errors with Future Perfect
sections.explanation: 1) 'By tomorrow I will finished' ❌ → 'By tomorrow I will have finished' ✅ (have missing न करें). 2) 'She will has completed' ❌ → 'She will have completed' ✅ (has नहीं, always have). 3) 'By tomorrow I will have finish' ❌ → V3 form ज़रूरी है, base verb नहीं।
sections.formula: Always: will + have + V3 (never will + has, never will + V1)

examples.english: By tomorrow, I will have finished.
examples.hindi: गलत: By tomorrow, I will finished.

examples.english: She will have completed the course.
examples.hindi: गलत: She will has completed the course.
